tasks.subject: Task 0: Project setup — Next.js, TS, Tailwind v4, Vitest, GitHub
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Working Next.js 15 + TS + Tailwind v4 + Vitest + first commit + Vercel deploy of "Hello Cota".

**Files:** package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.ts, vitest.config.ts, .gitignore, .env.local.example, app/layout.tsx, app/page.tsx, app/globals.css, README.md

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "tsconfig.json", "next.config.ts", "vitest.config.ts", ".env.local.example", "app/layout.tsx", "app/page.tsx", "app/globals.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run dev shows Cota coming soon", "npm run build succeeds", "npm test passes", "git repo + GitHub + Vercel deployed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Design system — tokens, fonts, shadcn init, base components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Visual foundation: editorial serif + sans, dark color tokens, shadcn primitives (button, input, card, label, select, radio-group, checkbox).

**Files:** app/globals.css, app/layout.tsx, components/ui/*, lib/utils.ts, components.json

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/globals.css", "app/layout.tsx", "components/ui/button.tsx", "components/ui/input.tsx", "components/ui/card.tsx", "lib/utils.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Fraunces + Inter loaded", "Dark color tokens defined", "shadcn primitives copied", "Buttons render on home"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Layout shell + legal page stubs + cookie banner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reusable layout (footer with legal links), 3 legal page stubs marked 'pendiente de revisión', minimal cookie banner.

**Files:** components/marketing/footer.tsx, components/cookie-banner.tsx, app/politica-privacidad/page.tsx, app/aviso-legal/page.tsx, app/cookies/page.tsx, app/layout.tsx

**Verify:** Manual: visit each page, dismiss cookie banner.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/marketing/footer.tsx", "components/cookie-banner.tsx", "app/politica-privacidad/page.tsx", "app/aviso-legal/page.tsx", "app/cookies/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Footer on all pages", "3 legal pages exist", "Cookie banner persists dismissal"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Pricing config files (single source of truth from spec §5)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Translate spec §5 into typed config: pricing.ts, wizard.ts, risks.ts, viability.ts + lib/pricing/types.ts.

**Files:** config/pricing.ts, config/wizard.ts, config/risks.ts, config/viability.ts, lib/pricing/types.ts

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["config/pricing.ts", "config/wizard.ts", "config/risks.ts", "config/viability.ts", "lib/pricing/types.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 4 quality levels with €/m²", "All modifiers from spec", "10 wizard steps defined", "Risk + viability rules typed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Pricing engine — calculate, viability, risks, duration + calibration test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure-function engine + critical calibration test (Salamanca 80m² 1920 → 96k-130k).

**Files:** lib/pricing/calculate.ts, lib/pricing/duration.ts, lib/pricing/diagnose.ts, tests/pricing/*.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/pricing/calculate.ts", "lib/pricing/duration.ts", "lib/pricing/diagnose.ts", "tests/pricing/calibration.test.ts", "tests/pricing/calculate.test.ts", "tests/pricing/viability.test.ts", "tests/pricing/risks.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["calibration test passes (96k-130k Salamanca)", "viability tests pass", "risk tests pass", "calculate tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Lead capture — types, repository, Resend, Google Sheets, API endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Repository pattern lead capture: Resend email + Google Sheets append, fan-out resilient.

**Files:** lib/leads/types.ts, lib/leads/repository.ts, lib/leads/resend.ts, lib/leads/google-sheets.ts, lib/leads/email-template.ts, app/api/leads/route.ts, tests/leads/repository.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm test -- leads`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/leads/types.ts", "lib/leads/repository.ts", "lib/leads/resend.ts", "lib/leads/google-sheets.ts", "lib/leads/email-template.ts", "app/api/leads/route.ts", "tests/leads/repository.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- leads", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LeadRepository interface defined", "Fan-out: one fail does not block other", "Zod validation on POST /api/leads", "Email + Sheets impls present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Wizard UI — 10-step state machine with animations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 10-step diagnostic wizard with persistent state (sessionStorage), Framer Motion transitions, mobile-perfect.

**Files:** app/diagnostico/page.tsx, components/wizard/*, lib/wizard-state.ts

**Verify:** Manual end-to-end on /diagnostico

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/diagnostico/page.tsx", "components/wizard/wizard.tsx", "components/wizard/progress-bar.tsx", "components/wizard/step-tipo.tsx", "components/wizard/step-metros.tsx", "components/wizard/step-barrio.tsx", "components/wizard/step-antiguedad.tsx", "components/wizard/step-calidad.tsx", "components/wizard/step-estado.tsx", "components/wizard/step-plazo.tsx", "components/wizard/step-extras.tsx", "components/wizard/step-presupuesto.tsx", "components/wizard/step-contacto.tsx", "lib/wizard-state.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["10 steps with back/next", "Progress bar X of 10", "State persists in sessionStorage", "Animations between steps", "Mobile touch targets >=44px"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Informe page — report visualization
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render diagnostic report from sessionStorage, submit lead to /api/leads once on mount.

**Files:** app/informe/page.tsx, components/informe/*

**Verify:** Manual: complete wizard → see informe → check Network tab

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/informe/page.tsx", "components/informe/informe.tsx", "components/informe/rango-precio.tsx", "components/informe/duracion.tsx", "components/informe/semaforo.tsx", "components/informe/riesgos.tsx", "components/informe/cta-dinamico.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Reads sessionStorage", "Renders all blocks", "POST /api/leads exactly once", "Redirects if no answers", "Print-friendly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Marketing landing — hero + all content sections
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Public home with 8 sections from spec brief. All copy in content/copy.ts. Use frontend-design skill for visual polish.

**Files:** components/marketing/*, content/copy.ts, app/page.tsx

**Verify:** Manual at 375/768/1440 widths + Lighthouse

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/marketing/hero.tsx", "components/marketing/autoridad.tsx", "components/marketing/propuesta-valor.tsx", "components/marketing/escenarios.tsx", "components/marketing/como-funciona.tsx", "components/marketing/filtrado.tsx", "components/marketing/agenda-block.tsx", "components/marketing/cierre.tsx", "content/copy.ts", "app/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 8 sections render in order", "Hero input redirects to wizard", "Copy in content/copy.ts", "Mobile perfect", "Lighthouse Performance >=85"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Agenda (Cal.com) + WhatsApp floating button
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cal.com lazy embed in agenda block + global floating WhatsApp button.

**Files:** components/whatsapp-floating.tsx, components/marketing/agenda-embed.tsx, app/layout.tsx

**Verify:** Manual: scroll to #agenda, click WhatsApp button

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/whatsapp-floating.tsx", "components/marketing/agenda-embed.tsx", "components/marketing/agenda-block.tsx", "app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Cal.com embed lazy-loads", "WhatsApp button on all pages", "Aria-labels present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: SEO — metadata, OG image, sitemap, robots, JSON-LD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sitemap, robots, dynamic OG image, per-page metadata, LocalBusiness JSON-LD. Lighthouse SEO >=95.

**Files:** app/sitemap.ts, app/robots.ts, app/opengraph-image.tsx, lib/seo.ts, app/page.tsx, app/diagnostico/page.tsx, app/informe/page.tsx

**Verify:** curl /sitemap.xml + /robots.txt; Lighthouse SEO

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/sitemap.ts", "app/robots.ts", "app/opengraph-image.tsx", "lib/seo.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sitemap.xml lists all pages", "robots.txt valid", "OG image generates", "JSON-LD on home", "Lighthouse SEO >=95"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: End-to-end wiring + lead delivery test + Vercel Analytics
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real env vars configured, real test lead arrives at email + Sheet, Analytics active, README written.

**Files:** README.md, .env.local (not committed), app/layout.tsx (Analytics)

**Verify:** Manual: complete wizard with real test contact

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Resend test email arrives", "Sheets test row appears", "Vercel Analytics installed", "README documents env vars"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: QA pass — Lighthouse, mobile, accessibility, performance
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Meet spec §11 criteria. Lighthouse mobile: Perf>=90, A11y>=95, BP>=95, SEO>=95.

**Files:** Various small fixes

**Verify:** Lighthouse on /, /diagnostico, /informe + real device test

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm start", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Lighthouse Perf>=90 mobile", "A11y>=95", "SEO>=95", "Real device tested", "Zero console errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Production deployment to cotamadrid.com
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Connect domain, SSL, prod env vars, smoke test in production.

**Files:** None (Vercel UI)

**Verify:** Open https://cotamadrid.com incognito, complete wizard, lead arrives in prod

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cotamadrid.com resolves with SSL", ".es redirects to .com", "Prod env vars set", "Real test lead works in prod", "v1.0.0 tagged"]}
```
